title: Verify Mutual Exclusivity with Other Experiments
description: Tests that users who are part of the Trial Corner cohort do not see other conflicting onboarding or post-trial experiments.
preconditions: There is another active experiment, e.g., 'Onboarding Pop-up'.
A user is created who qualifies for both experiments (new user, no consumption).

steps.description: 1. As the new user, start a trial and do not watch content for 6 minutes.
2. Navigate through the app, specifically to areas where the 'Onboarding Pop-up' would normally trigger.
3. Verify the 'Onboarding Pop-up' does NOT appear.
4. Navigate to the homepage and verify the 'Trial Corner' widget DOES appear.

expected_result: The Trial Corner experiment correctly takes precedence, and the user is excluded from other potentially conflicting experiments as specified in the PRD.
